title: the Post Office Recurring Deposit (Amendment) Rules, 1992.
description: the Post Office Recurring Deposit (Amendment) Rules, 1992.
text: REGD No. D.L.-33004/92 The Gazette of India EXTRAORDINARY PART II—Section 3—Sub-section (i) PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY No. 501] NEW DELHI, FRIDAY, DECEMBER 11, 1992/AGRAHAYANA 20, 1914 Separate Paging is given to this Part in order that it may be filed as a separate compilation 3019 GI/92 (1) -- 1 of 4 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(i)] -- 2 of 4 -- 3 MINISTRY OF FINANCE (Department of Economic Affairs) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 11th December, 1992 G.S.R. 918(E).- In exercise of the powers conferred by section 15 of the Government Savings Banks Act, 1873 (5 of 1873), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Post Office Rccuiring Deposil Rules, 1981 namely : ~ 1. 0) These rules may be called the Post Office Rccurri,lB Deposit (Amendment) Rules, 1992. (il) They shall come into force on the date of tlieir nubhea- tion in the Official Gazette. ^ 2, In the Post Office Recurring Deposit Rules, 1981. la) i» rule 12, in sub-rules (3) of and (4) for the word and tigures "Tables 5 , 6 , 7 , 8 , 9, 10, 15, 16 or 19" the word and iigures "Tables 5,6,7,8,9,10,15 16 19 24 or 25" shall be substituted; ' ' 0>) in the opening para of Table 19, for the words, figures and letters "on or after the 1st April, 1987", the words iigures and letters "on or after 1 st April, 1987 but be- fore 31st March, 1991" shall be substituted.
